ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or division of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the state's data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the state's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_insecurity_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food insecurity rate */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the rate belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the rate was recorded */,
  "rate" REAL /* Food insecurity rate for the state */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the food insecurity rate data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the food insecurity rate */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the food insecurity rate */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_insecurity_rates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "estimated_numbers" (
  "number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimated number */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the number belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the number was recorded */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Estimated number of food-insecure persons for the state */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the estimated number data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to estimate the number of food-insecure persons */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the estimated number */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimated_numbers_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the threshold belongs to */,
  "low_threshold" REAL /* Low threshold for the state */,
  "low_threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of low threshold (e.g., SNAP, Other Nutrition Programs) */,
  "high_threshold" REAL /* High threshold for the state */,
  "high_threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of high threshold (e.g., SNAP, Other Nutrition Programs) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the threshold data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to determine the thresholds */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percentages" (
  "percentage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentage */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the percentage belongs to */,
  "below_low_threshold" REAL /* Percentage of food-insecure persons below the low threshold */,
  "between_thresholds" REAL /* Percentage of food-insecure persons between thresholds */,
  "above_high_threshold" REAL /* Percentage of food-insecure persons above the high threshold */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the percentage data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the percentages */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percentage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percentages_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "child_food_insecurity_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child food insecurity rate */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the rate belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the rate was recorded */,
  "rate" REAL /* Child food insecurity rate for the state */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the child food insecurity rate data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the child food insecurity rate */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the child food insecurity rate */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_child_food_insecurity_rates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "numbers_of_food_insecure_children" (
  "number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each number of food-insecure children */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the number belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the number was recorded */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Number of food-insecure children for the state */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the number of food-insecure children data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to estimate the number of food-insecure children */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the number of food-insecure children */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_numbers_of_food_insecure_children_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percentages_of_food_insecure_children" (
  "percentage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentage */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the percentage belongs to */,
  "below_185_fpl" REAL /* Percentage of food-insecure children in households with incomes below 185% FPL */,
  "above_185_fpl" REAL /* Percentage of food-insecure children in households with incomes above 185% FPL */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the percentage of food-insecure children data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the percentages */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percentage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percentages_of_food_insecure_children_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs_per_meal" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost per meal */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the cost belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the cost was recorded */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost per meal for the state */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the cost per meal data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the cost per meal */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_per_meal_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weighted_annual_dollars" (
  "dollar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weighted annual dollar */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the dollar belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the dollar was recorded */,
  "dollars" INTEGER /* Weighted annual dollar for the state */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the weighted annual dollars data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the weighted annual dollars */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dollar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weighted_annual_dollars_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the data belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrition_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrition program */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the program belongs to */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the nutrition program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of nutrition program (e.g., SNAP, Other Nutrition Programs) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the nutrition program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the nutrition program */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the nutrition program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the nutrition program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrition_programs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
